name: sync push uses the tdd-pro-sync branch name as the destination ref
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m init) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/sync/push.sh" --root repo --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'branch=tdd-pro-sync' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
